headlines.headline: 2026 NBA buzz: Latest news, injuries, league intel, updates
headlines.description: We're tracking the latest news, rumors and buzz across the NBA, including what we're hearing on Giannis Antetokounmpo ahead of trade season.

headlines.headline: The enduring legacy of 'Sirius,' the Chicago Bulls' entrance anthem
headlines.description: Thirty years after Chicago's historic run, the story of "Sirius" is also the story of how music helped build one of the most iconic brands in sports.

headlines.headline: Sources: Cameron Jordan to return to Saints on 1-year deal
headlines.description: The Saints are set to bring back star defensive end Cameron Jordan for a 16th season, sources told ESPN.

headlines.headline: Bucs' Baker Mayfield pushes back on durability; talks contract
headlines.description: Bucs QB Baker Mayfield pushed back Tuesday at the notion that he needs to better protect himself while adding that he and the team are not close on contract negotiations.

headlines.headline: MSG fits the plot for Taylor Swift-Travis Kelce wedding
headlines.description: Has a commissioned stage and a nod from NYC Mayor Mamdani seemingly confirmed what the "Life of a Showgirl" singer already spelled out for us?

headlines.headline: Kevin Stefanski confirms James Pearce Jr.'s return to Falcons
headlines.description: Kevin Stefanski confirms James Pearce Jr.'s return to Falcons

headlines.headline: Sources: Ex-Browns GM Pace joining rival Vikings in adviser role
headlines.description: The Minnesota Vikings have hired Ryan Pace, who led the Bears 2015-21 before spending the past four seasons in the Atlanta Falcons' personnel department and will provide a GM-level sounding board for new GM Nolan Teasley.

headlines.headline: Falcons confirm James Pearce Jr.'s return 4 months after arrest
headlines.description: Falcons head coach Kevin Stefanski confirmed James Pearce Jr. has returned to the team four months after a domestic violence arrest and will do individual drills. The NFL says Pearce's case remains under review.

headlines.headline: Flyers acquire goalie Woll, defenseman Benoit from Maple Leafs
headlines.description: The Philadelphia Flyers acquired goaltender Joseph Woll and defenseman Simon Benoit in a trade with the Toronto Maple Leafs on Tuesday.

headlines.headline: John Tortorella won't return as coach of Golden Knights
headlines.description: John Tortorella, who was hired with eight games left in the regular season and guided the Golden Knights to the Stanley Cup Final, will not return as coach next season.

headlines.headline: Former NHL player Kyle Calder, 47, dies after brief illness
headlines.description: Former NHL player Kyle Calder died Monday after a brief illness, his daughter announced. He was 47.

headlines.headline: PWHL's Las Vegas expansion team names Kim Weiss coach
headlines.description: The PWHL's Las Vegas expansion team has named Kim Weiss its new head coach. Weiss has spent the past two seasons as an assistant in the AHL.

headlines.headline: Report: NHL to investigate Babcock's resignation from Columbus
headlines.description: The NHL is beginning an investigation into Mike Babcock's resignation as coach of the Columbus Blue Jackets in September 2023 before he coached a game for them, a person with knowledge of the situation told The Associated Press on Monday.

headlines.headline: Stanley Cup odds: Hurricanes favored repeat as Cup champs, Avalanche second for 2027
headlines.description: The Carolina Hurricanes, Colorado Avalanche and Vegas Golden Knights are favorites to win the 2027 Stanley Cup.
